title: Philippine enterprises may be sitting on a ticking time bomb—and most of them do not know it yet.
description: Manila Times feature on quantum threats to Philippine banking, digital ID and critical infrastructure encryption; notes BSP, DICT and private-sector CISOs have begun engaging with post-quantum standards. Journalism, not an institutional issuer.

title: How Philippine Banks Can Move Directly to Quantum-Safe Security Before BSP's Deadline
description: Vendor (Wultra) blog framing the June 2026 BSP Circular 1213 / AFASA authentication deadline as an opportunity to adopt quantum-safe / post-quantum authentication. Vendor marketing; the BSP deadline itself is not a PQC mandate.

title: DICT fortifies PH cybersafety with National Cybersecurity Plan '23-'28
description: Philippine Information Agency press release on the National Cybersecurity Plan 2023-2028 approved by President Marcos Jr. No explicit post-quantum / PQC reference found.

title: National Cyber Security Plan (NCSP) 2023-2028 page
description: DICT landing page for the National Cybersecurity Plan 2023-2028. General cyber strategy; no explicit PQC mention found.

title: National Cybersecurity Plan 2023-2028 (final PDF)
description: DICT National Cybersecurity Plan 2023-2028 full PDF (Republic of the Philippines). Could not extract text to confirm; general strategy predating NIST's 2024 PQC standards, no evidence of explicit PQC content.

title: BSP Memorandum M-2024-029
description: Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas 2024 memorandum surfaced under a cybersecurity query; PDF text not extractable. No confirmed quantum/PQC content.

title: BSP Circular No. 1213 (IT Risk Management / AFASA implementation)
description: Related BSP IT-risk-management and merchant-payment issuances (Circulars 1213 / 1198). Confirmed via secondary sources to contain no quantum-cryptography provisions; June 2026 deadline concerns phishing-resistant authentication, not PQC.

title: Philippines Pushes Quantum Readiness Through Multi-Sector National Workshop
description: Substack account of the Quantum Readiness Workshop (Apr 2026) organised by the Quantum Computing Society of the Philippines with IBM Quantum, DOST-PCIEERD, DICT Cybersecurity Bureau and others; covered PQC as session content. Society-run event write-up, not a government issuance.

title: PH ramps up push for quantum computing readiness
description: Tech-news coverage of the Philippine quantum readiness workshop and roadmap. Journalism; quantum-computing focus.

title: DOST advances quantum technology dev't for national progress
description: Philippine Information Agency story on DOST quantum technology development under the national Quantum Technology Roadmap (to 2035). Focus on quantum computing R&D capacity; no explicit PQC migration content.

title: Quantum computing, AI, and smart agri to elevate PH's innovation
description: DOST news page on quantum computing as a national innovation priority (HTTP 403 on fetch). Quantum-computing framing; no confirmed explicit PQC reference.

title: Quantum Hackathon Sparks Innovation at Cebu Institute of Technology
description: DOST-ASTI news article on a quantum hackathon. Quantum-computing capacity building; no explicit PQC cryptography-migration content.

title: Quantum Computing and Telesurgery Seen as New Areas to be supported by Research Infrastructures
description: DOST-ASTI news on research infrastructure priorities including quantum computing. No explicit PQC reference.

title: The Philippines looks to tap into quantum computing
description: GovInsider article on the Philippine Quantum Technology Roadmap (target year pushed to 2035). Journalism; quantum-computing R&D focus.

title: Patero and Calibr8 Systems Form Strategic Alliance to Accelerate Post Quantum Cryptography Adoption in Australia and the Philippines
description: Vendor press release (BusinessWire) on a private PQC commercial alliance covering the Philippines. Commercial; not an institutional issuer.
